name: Ladysmith Memorial Park
description: Ladysmith Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Ladysmith, WI. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Weyerhaeuser Community Park
description: Weyerhaeuser Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Weyerhaeuser, WI. There are 6 outdoor acrylic and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
